markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between VerticalScope and growthx.ai to accelerate content generation and engagement on VerticalScope's forum properties.](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [VerticalScope's main challenge is maintaining content velocity and post volume across their forum properties](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Current tactics include reviving old threads, translating content, and manually seeding new communities](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Potential focus area: Accelerating and scaling the process of launching new forum communities](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Revenue model primarily based on programmatic advertising, with some subscription and affiliate revenue](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Generation Tactics

  - [Reviving old threads with valuable information by asking questions or posting fresh content](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Translating high-volume threads into multiple languages (starting with 6) using Google Vertex AI](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Manually seeding new communities with content, simulating community activity](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Declining post volume over time across properties](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Heavy dependence on organic search traffic from Google](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [Need to diversify traffic sources beyond search](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2095.0)
  - [Changing user preferences, particularly towards video content](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [Opportunity to curate content across entire verticals (e.g., motorcycle content across 400 sites)](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Accelerating and scaling the process of launching new forum communities](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Developing strategies to keep users engaged beyond initial search visits](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
  - [Implementing pillar-cluster content strategies to enhance SEO and user engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)
  - [Exploring video integration to support community engagement and multi-channel distribution](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)

### VerticalScope's Business Model

  - [Revenue primarily from programmatic advertising](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Additional income from subscriptions and affiliate commerce](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [2022 revenue: \~$70 million USD online, \~$30 million EBITDA](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)
  - [Large email database (65+ million) with potential for improved engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

### Next Steps for Collaboration

  - [Chris to discuss with VerticalScope's forums team and share more details on site seeding process](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Explore customization of growthx.ai workflows to fit VerticalScope's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Consider starting with one clear problem to solve as a proof of concept](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chris to share documentation on site seeding process with growthx.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)
  - [Follow up discussion in Slack channel for ongoing ideation](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2402.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled for Friday, May 23rd at 10 AM Pacific Time](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)
  - [growthx.ai team to consider potential customizations based on VerticalScope's needs](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2350.0)
  - [Explore strategies for diversifying traffic sources and increasing user engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RKAKQF7UXJrY5Ti26kfcvAsPfWovxg-w?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)
